name: song-builder-templates
note: M-13 g1 TEMPLATE-SUGGESTED SECTIONS (the M-12 -> M-13 payoff). Persona at 412x915: build a Verse (C-F-G), Add as Verse, then Clear the canvas. The buffer is non-empty + the progression is empty, so the SONG tray now offers proven-progression chips (SongTemplates.forSection) realized in the song's key. Switch the suggestion label to Chorus, tap the first chip -> the progression fills through the chord-add path (slots > 0, A3 clear-undo invalidated) and the add-row label is pre-set to Chorus. Add as Chorus, Assemble -> the song view shows BOTH Verse + Chorus headers. Red-first: #songSuggest does not exist on unmodified main, so step 12 (assertVisible #songSuggest) fails there. GREEN requires song-templates.js wired into play/index.html + sw.js CORE (a coupled parent merge step) so the chips populate. S-COMPOSE-CALM (2026-07-19): first capture enters via the Save sheet (grow/add); later captures ride the Build-the-chords hop; every capture clears the strip and lands on the canvas.

steps.label: jam surface clean - tray is transaction chrome (S-COMPOSE-CALM)
S-COMPOSE-CALM: no ambient tray cue on the jam surface (guidance moved to the Save sheet + canvas)
one buffered Verse; the capture cleared the strip (one contract everywhere)
the canvas cue is live once a section is buffered
progression empty; the draft persists in the buffer (the canvas shows it on demand)
at least one realized chorus template chip is offered
chip fills the progression (slots > 0) via the chord-add path
A3: the Clear-undo banner is invalidated by the fill
the seeded section carries forward - add-row label pre-set to Chorus
name the assembled song and confirm
steps.js: (function(){var row=document.querySelector('.composeRow.asModal');if(!row||row.hidden)return false;var inp=row.querySelector('input');if(!inp)return false;inp.value='Template test song';var btns=row.querySelectorAll('button');for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){if(/save/i.test(btns[i].textContent)){btns[i].click();return true;}}return false;})()

steps.label: song view shows both section headers (Verse + Chorus)
